argv: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $failed=@(); Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Filter *.ps1 | ForEach-Object { $tokens=$null; $errors=$null; [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile($_.FullName,[ref]$tokens,[ref]$errors) | Out-Null; if($errors.Count -gt 0){$failed += $_.FullName} }; if($failed.Count -gt 0){$failed | Write-Error; exit 1}
